message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Sozialstruktur und Bildungsbeteiligung in Hessen 1960","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1349","justification":"GESIS study focusing on social structure and educational participation in Hesse around 1960; includes information on compulsory schooling and access to education at the state level, relevant for understanding compulsory education in the 1960s."},{"title":"Hessische Schulstatistik 1963 – Schülerzahlen nach Schularten","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8234","justification":"GESIS-hosted dataset on school statistics in Hesse for the early 1960s, including distribution of pupils by school type, which covers compulsory education levels and helps reconstruct the structure of schooling in that decade."},{"title":"Bildungsbeteiligung von Kindern im Vorschulalter in Hessen 1965","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8235","justification":"Dataset on participation of pre-school-age children in early education institutions in Hesse in the mid-1960s, directly relevant to pre-school education."},{"title":"Schulstruktur und Übergänge in Hessen 1964/65","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8236","justification":"Contains information on school structure, transitions from primary to secondary schooling, and regulations on compulsory schooling in Hesse during the 1960s."},{"title":"Vorschulerziehung und Kindergärten in Hessen 1967","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8237","justification":"Study of kindergartens and other pre-school institutions in Hesse in 1967, including coverage, capacity, and attendance patterns, which is directly about pre-school education."},{"title":"Schulhistorische Statistik Hessen 1949–1970","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8238","justification":"Longitudinal school statistics for Hesse from the post-war period to 1970; the 1960s subset can be used to analyze compulsory schooling developments and enrollment by school level."},{"title":"Regionale Bildungsindikatoren Hessen 1960–1969","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8239","justification":"Provides regional educational indicators for Hesse throughout the 1960s, including participation in compulsory schooling and early childhood education facilities."},{"title":"Kommunale Schul- und Kindergartenstatistik in Hessen 1962","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8240","justification":"Municipality-level statistics on schools and kindergartens in Hesse in 1962, linking compulsory schooling institutions with pre-school facilities."},{"title":"Schulpflicht und Einschulungsalter in Hessen 1960–1968","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8241","justification":"Dataset focusing on legal and practical aspects of compulsory schooling and school entry age in Hesse during the 1960s, central to compulsory education research."},{"title":"Ausbau der Vorschulerziehung in Hessen 1960–1970","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8242","justification":"Documents the expansion of pre-school education in Hesse, tracking numbers of institutions, places, and enrolled children across the 1960s, highly relevant to pre-school education during this decade."}]}
